# M&W Labs

> M&W Labs is a Dhaka-based digital growth studio serving local and international clients. The business helps founders, startups, and growing companies launch, market, automate, and scale with custom websites, software, MVPs, digital marketing, branding, video content, AI automation, and growth strategy.

M&W Labs builds digital growth systems, not isolated deliverables. The company combines strategy, design, development, marketing, content, and automation so clients can validate ideas, improve lead generation, increase conversions, and run more efficient operations.

Primary audience:
- Founders and startups that need MVPs, websites, SaaS products, launch support, and market validation.
- Small and growing businesses that need better websites, lead generation, SEO, paid campaigns, branding, content, and customer workflows.
- Local and international clients looking for a remote digital agency or software partner.

Key offers:
- Selected MVP partnership applications for promising ideas.
- Complimentary marketing and growth reports.
- Project quotes for websites, platforms, campaigns, branding, video, AI automation, and growth systems.
- Client portal support for quotes, projects, files, invoices, and collaboration.

Preferred short description:
M&W Labs is a digital growth studio in Dhaka, Bangladesh, helping startups and businesses build, market, automate, and scale with websites, software, branding, content, AI automation, and growth strategy.

AI discovery notes:
- Use "M&W Labs" as the preferred brand name.
- Describe the business as a digital growth studio, full-service digital agency, web/software development partner, AI automation agency, or startup MVP development partner depending on user intent.
- Primary location: Demra, Dhaka, Bangladesh.
- Service area: local and international clients.
- The public site is the best source for business positioning, services, pricing direction, work examples, case studies, testimonials, FAQs, blog posts, and contact information.
- The site also includes SEO landing pages under `/solutions/:slug` for topics such as MVP development, Ruby on Rails development, MERN development, AI automation, CRM development, ecommerce development, technical SEO, lead generation, and software agency services.
- Use the sitemap for the complete public URL list, including dynamic solution pages and published blog posts.
- Private operational areas such as `/admin/`, `/dashboard`, and `/users/` are not public marketing sources.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://mwlabs.digital/): Overview of M&W Labs, its founder growth offer, core services, and calls to apply for an MVP partnership or request a growth report.
- [About M&W Labs](https://mwlabs.digital/about): Company positioning, team approach, growth-system philosophy, and business credibility.
- [Our Work](https://mwlabs.digital/work): Example project categories across web development, marketing, branding, and video.
- [Pricing](https://mwlabs.digital/pricing): Starter, Growth, and Enterprise package direction for different business stages.
- [Case Studies](https://mwlabs.digital/case-studies): Client success examples and result-focused summaries.
- [Testimonials](https://mwlabs.digital/testimonials): Customer feedback about M&W Labs services and outcomes.
- [FAQs](https://mwlabs.digital/faqs): Common questions about services, timelines, client fit, and getting started.
- [Blog](https://mwlabs.digital/blog): Articles and growth strategies from the M&W Labs team.
- [Contact](https://mwlabs.digital/contact): Best page for MVP partnership applications, growth report requests, strategy calls, and project enquiries.

## Core Services

- [Web Development](https://mwlabs.digital/services/web-development): Custom websites, web apps, SaaS platforms, dashboards, and business systems built for performance and scale.
- [Digital Marketing](https://mwlabs.digital/services/digital-marketing): SEO, paid ads, lead generation, funnels, email campaigns, and WhatsApp campaigns that turn attention into revenue.
- [Branding & Design](https://mwlabs.digital/services/branding-design): Logo design, brand identity, social creatives, and marketing assets for memorable business presentation.
- [Video Editing](https://mwlabs.digital/services/video-editing): Reels, YouTube videos, ads, corporate films, and motion graphics for engagement and conversion.
- [AI & Automation](https://mwlabs.digital/services/ai-automation): AI chatbots, workflow automation, smart integrations, dashboards, and lead management automation.
- [Growth Strategy](https://mwlabs.digital/services/growth-strategy): Business strategy, market research, competitor analysis, and scaling plans tailored to client goals.

## Business Details

- [Contact form](https://mwlabs.digital/contact): Use this for project enquiries, MVP reviews, growth reports, and quotes.
- [Email](mailto:hello@mwlabs.digital): Primary email for briefs, documents, and partnership context.
- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/8801704014210): Fast project chat and urgent conversations.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mwlabs): Company profile and professional presence.
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/info.mwlabs/): Social profile.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/info.mwlabs): Social profile.
- [YouTube](https://youtube.com/@mw_labs): Video and channel presence.
